title: Bug - Can't import more than 1k hosts per Active Directory OU
author: darthur205
body_snippet: Expect to import full OU from AD. Import finishes with at most 1k host per OU with 1k+ items and discards the remainder. Can't feasibly manually add the remaining hosts or adjust AD structure. Occurs on stable v1.76.20 and dev v1.77.1. Client running on Windows 10 x64 systems.

iterations.description: DirectorySearcher.PageSize is not set (default 0), so LDAP server caps results at 1000; setting PageSize enables paged queries to retrieve all entries.

notes:
AI triage (claude): DirectorySearcher.PageSize is not set (default 0), so LDAP server caps results at 1000; setting PageSize enables paged queries to retrieve all entries.
Approach: Add ldapSearcher.PageSize = 1000 before FindAll() to enable LDAP paged result retrieval, which bypasses the 1000-entry server limit.
